moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stage Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage begins today with the Round of 32, featuring 32 teams competing for the trophy.

angles.name: Knockout Football
angles.copy: It's officially knockout football time! The World Cup Round of 32 starts today. Who are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: Do-or-Die
angles.copy: No second chances now! The FIFA World Cup 2026 moves into the do-or-die knockout stages from today. Every match is a final.

moments.title: England's World Cup Knockout Challenge
moments.blurb: England will play DR Congo in the FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 on Wednesday, July 1st.

angles.name: Three Lions Ready
angles.copy: The Three Lions are ready! England face DR Congo in the World Cup Round of 32 on Wednesday. Can they make it to the next round?

angles.name: Nation Holds Breath
angles.copy: Wednesday, July 1st. Mark it down. England's World Cup journey continues with a huge knockout game. The nation holds its breath!

moments.title: Wimbledon Fortnight Serves Up
moments.blurb: The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, the third Grand Slam of the tennis season, begins on Monday, June 29th, at the All England Club.

angles.name: Strawberries & Cream
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 begins on Monday. Who's your pick for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles?

angles.name: SW19 Awaits
angles.copy: The grass courts of SW19 await! The world's best tennis players descend on London for Wimbledon, starting Monday. Get ready for two weeks of epic action.

moments.title: Wireless Festival London Approaches
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival returns to London's Finsbury Park from July 10-12, with Ye (Kanye West) confirmed as a headliner.

angles.name: London Ready
angles.copy: London, are you ready for Wireless? The festival kicks off July 10th with Ye leading the charge. Who are you hoping to catch?

angles.name: Finsbury Park Buzzing
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is just around the corner! Finsbury Park will be buzzing from July 10-12 with huge names in hip-hop and grime.

moments.title: Katy Perry Live in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Katy Perry performs at Cardiff Castle on Tuesday, June 30th, as part of the DEPOT Live concert series.

angles.name: Roar in Cardiff
angles.copy: Get ready to roar! Katy Perry takes over Cardiff Castle on Tuesday. Who's excited for a night of pure pop magic?

angles.name: Firework Display
angles.copy: Firework display guaranteed! Katy Perry live at Cardiff Castle this Tuesday. Don't miss out if you're in the area!

moments.title: Pop-Punk & Folk-Punk Double Bill in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Bowling For Soup and Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls co-headline Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Punk Double Bill
angles.copy: Pop-punk legends Bowling For Soup team up with folk-punk hero Frank Turner at Cardiff Castle this Saturday. What a double bill!

angles.name: Saturday Night
angles.copy: Grab your tickets for Saturday! Bowling For Soup and Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls are bringing the energy to Cardiff Castle.

moments.title: Cardiff Unity Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Cardiff's Unity Festival, celebrating inclusive arts, runs from June 30th to July 5th with performances and free street theatre across Cardiff Bay.

angles.name: Inclusive Arts
angles.copy: Experience the power of inclusive arts! Cardiff Unity Festival kicks off June 30th, bringing vibrant performances and free street theatre to Cardiff Bay.

angles.name: Cardiff Bay Alive
angles.copy: Cardiff Bay is set to come alive with creativity! Unity Festival runs June 30th - July 5th, showcasing incredible talent and diverse performances.

moments.title: Cardiff Food and Drink Festival Returns
moments.blurb: The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival will take place in Roald Dahl Plass, Cardiff Bay, from July 3rd to 5th, featuring local produce, delicacies, and live music.

angles.name: Foodies Assemble
angles.copy: Foodies, assemble! The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival is back in Roald Dahl Plass from July 3rd-5th. Get ready to taste the best of Wales and beyond!

angles.name: Delicious Delights
angles.copy: Delicious delights and live music! The Cardiff Food and Drink Festival is the perfect way to spend a summer weekend in Cardiff Bay, starting July 3rd.

moments.title: Love Trails Festival on the Gower
moments.blurb: The Love Trails Festival, combining trail running, adventure, and music, takes place at Weobley Castle on the Gower Peninsula from July 2nd to 6th.

angles.name: Run Rave Repeat
angles.copy: Run, rave, repeat! Love Trails Festival hits the stunning Gower Peninsula from July 2nd-6th. Get ready for an unforgettable adventure!

angles.name: Music & Adventure
angles.copy: Music, trails, and good vibes! The unique Love Trails Festival is happening at Weobley Castle on the Gower next week. Who's joining the adventure?

moments.title: Exeter Enjoys Summer Events
moments.blurb: Exeter is alive with cultural events and activities throughout the summer, including exhibitions at RAMM and various local happenings.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: The summer vibes are in full swing in Exeter! From art exhibitions to outdoor events, there's plenty to explore across the city.

angles.name: Making the Most
angles.copy: Making the most of the summer in Exeter? Check out the latest cultural happenings and local events happening across the city!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: Iconic Blondie frontwoman Deborah Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Call Me
angles.copy: Call Me! The legendary Debbie Harry of Blondie turns 81 on Wednesday. What's your all-time favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Iconic Cool
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Deborah Harry on July 1st! Still effortlessly cool and an absolute icon.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st.

angles.name: Get Ur Freak On
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The incredible Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Wednesday. A true pioneer of hip-hop and R&B.

angles.name: Visionary
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the visionary Missy Elliott on July 1st! What's your favourite track from her iconic catalogue?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger!
moments.blurb: Pussycat Dolls frontwoman and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Don't Cha
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish her a Happy Birthday? Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Fabulous
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on June 29th! From pop star to TV judge, she does it all.

moments.title: Happy Birthday RZA!
moments.blurb: Legendary Wu-Tang Clan producer and rapper RZA celebrates his 56th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Protect Ya Neck
angles.copy: Protect Ya Neck and wish RZA a Happy Birthday! The mastermind behind Wu-Tang Clan turns 56 on Sunday.

angles.name: Abbot Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the iconic RZA on July 5th! What's your favourite Wu-Tang Clan track produced by the Abbot?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Evelyn 'Champagne' King!
moments.blurb: Disco and R&B icon Evelyn 'Champagne' King celebrates her 66th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Shame!
angles.copy: Shame! it's not her birthday every day! Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Evelyn 'Champagne' King on July 1st.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Wishing a sparkling 66th Birthday to disco queen Evelyn 'Champagne' King this Wednesday! What's your go-to track for the dancefloor?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke!
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer and Erasure co-founder Vince Clarke celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: A Little Respect
angles.copy: A Little Respect for a synth legend! Happy 66th Birthday to Erasure's Vince Clarke on Friday.

angles.name: Electronic Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the electronic music maestro, Vince Clarke, on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, his influence is immense.
